Class Virus

java.lang.Object
org.jscience.natural.biology.Virus
All Implemented Interfaces:
Serializable, Commented, ComprehensiveIdentification, Identified<Identification>, Named
public class Virus extends Object implements ComprehensiveIdentification
Represents a virus - an infectious agent that replicates inside living cells. Implements ComprehensiveIdentification to support dynamic traits and consistent identity.
Since:
1.0
Author:
Silvere Martin-Michiellot, Gemini AI (Google DeepMind)
See Also:
